segments.text:
PROTEIN SYNTHESIS
Starts in cytosol with free ribosomes translating mRNA
Proteins transported into many organelles

ORGANELLES
Membrane bound (separated from cytosol)
Contain function-specific molecules and proteins

PROTEIN TARGETING
Would be easy if cells looked like this inside
BUT they don’t!

REAL ORGANELLE DISTRIBUTION
Organelles packed closely in cell
We’ll answer how proteins get targeted to the right place in this mess.
